text.message: sorry dude, not sure what was bots rationale
this nb ns stuff is so bad, just rob who you think is the leader
which is prob you besides orange lol
totally fine being robbed if you think I am the leader. I will give some pushback if I think it is egregious but otherwise
see that's where its so bad
and OJ trades a tree they didn't have to trade
fwiw that was a misclick red, sorry
youre definitely not the steal there
to add insult to injury it was the sheep I traded for previously
just stop with the nb shitttt and maybe you won't get confused next time
orange set up nice for longest road
blue I don't totally hate you, you can rob me still
but why steal from me twice though when orange/red gonna take longest road and I'm not taking army
I can tell. not frustrated with you, just the nb culture haha
i hook it up for pipdaddy
I just don't have the production like you guys have - I think orange and red should be considered blue
yeah I am all about spreading the love
I have soloed oj before before I had to
you're doing well, it only rolls when blocked
what do u need to settle black
Eh OJ doesn't have rocks though, and I can compete for road
a golden ticket to keep blocking black at least haha
and he doesn't have wood, fair trade I think
I am about to settle on my only port and its desert
its a good connect down the middle
sneaky road, makes one of us take it early and get the blocks for it so its not a sneaky win
you dont complain about it when you take the deal huh? :p
ok again fair enough, but you gotta assume orange or red takes road and jumps ahead lol
Oh shit, I should have taken road
thank goodness blue could have won with 2 vp
that was a little petty solo from me
I do think it is red
which is why I was confused when  ustole from me
i put it on both of you
I already have the army point on my score
it was a horse a piece on who I steal from
they dont have the road and open settle
haha yeah blue but that army point is getting you dangerously close to 10 now lol
i do agree read ahead of u
OJ with a city here to keep it fun too
no no leave it for me
haha not too different when you get that settle :p
i see what ur saying that was bad of me
so i can build two roads
this is tough for me, I don't think I can get road now, so I need to build 2 cities or draw a vp
if blue has two vps its gg
what do u need to connect?
u have an open settle about to be on 9
chill dude giving OJ the game
they can trade in for it with port
yeah should prob be on orange her
The trade that will go down in infamy
its ahrd for me to get my last point
I would bet my next week's salary OJ wins now
orange you can settle and city pretty easy for you lol
ok how about this no more trades lol
I know u got 2 ore more cuz I keep getting these knights
mono wins it for blue, hope black has it
prob blue cause he asked ofr many vps
now i lose cause I cant get my last pt
Will the game last another turn
oj can pop, red can city, black can be on 9 and opo, I can be on 9 and pop
still 4 knights left in the deck, pull or wait
i'm the only person not on 9 lol
just pull and win the game already
